summary:
Fixed the data-corruption issue.

Problem  
segments_for_worker in src/config.rs gave each worker an overlapping range, so two or more threads could write to the same file offsets at the same time. The integrity test therefore failed when it detected overlapping assignments.

Fix  
Re-implemented segments_for_worker so that:

• Every segment index 0‥num_segments-1 is assigned to exactly one worker (no overlaps).  
• When num_segments doesn’t divide evenly by num_workers, the remainder segments are distributed one-by-one to the first workers.

After the change:

/app/test.sh  
=== Concurrent Write Integrity Test ===  
…  
VERIFY: File integrity check passed  
OK: No overlapping segment assignments  
PASS: All concurrent write runs produced correct output

The “needle” was the overlapping assignment logic, and the patch removes it.
